allow: PowerShell($git = Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "git: " + $\(if\($git\){$git.Source}else{"NOT FOUND"}\); $gh = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "gh: " + $\(if\($gh\){$gh.Source}else{"NOT FOUND"}\))

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills" -Headers @{ "User-Agent"="claude" } -ErrorAction Stop; "EXISTS: $\($r.full_name\) | private=$\($r.private\) | default=$\($r.default_branch\) | size=$\($r.size\)KB" } catch { "API result: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\) $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell("cred.helper: " + \(git config --global credential.helper\); "user.name: " + \(git config --global user.name\); "user.email: " + \(git config --global user.email\); $t = $env:GITHUB_TOKEN; "GITHUB_TOKEN set: " + [bool]$t; $t2 = $env:GH_TOKEN; "GH_TOKEN set: " + [bool]$t2)
